content.intro: References in PropertyGoose are pay-per-use. The price per reference depends on your subscription plan, with discounts available for Standard and Professional subscribers.

sections.title: Reference Pricing by Plan
sections.content: PAYG (no subscription): £17.50 per reference. Standard (£11.99/month): £13.00 per reference. Professional (£24.99/month): £12.50 per reference. Each reference covers a single tenant. If you are referencing multiple tenants for one property, each tenant is a separate reference charge.

sections.title: How to Pay for a Reference

steps.title: Create a reference from an approved offer
steps.content: In the Offers tab, find an approved offer and click 'Start Reference'.

steps.title: Review the reference details
steps.content: Confirm the tenant details, property, and move-in date before proceeding to payment.

steps.title: Pay at checkout
steps.content: You are taken to a secure Stripe checkout page. Enter your card details and confirm payment. The reference is created immediately after successful payment.

steps.title: Reference sent to tenant
steps.content: Once payment is confirmed, the tenant receives an email with a link to complete their reference questionnaire.

sections.title: Bulk References
sections.content: When referencing multiple tenants for the same property, each tenant is charged individually. The per-reference price is determined by your current plan at the time of purchase.

sections.title: Save with a Subscription
sections.content: If you run references regularly, subscribing to Standard or Professional reduces your per-reference cost. For example, at 3 references per month on Standard, the subscription pays for itself through the reference discount alone.

sections.title: Payment History
sections.content: All reference payments are recorded in your billing history. Go to Settings to view past transactions and download invoices.
